acceptance_criteria.text: File exists at design/landing.html with parent design/ directory.
First non-empty line is <!DOCTYPE html>; <html> has lang attribute.
Charset utf-8 and viewport meta with width=device-width, initial-scale=1.
Exactly one <title>; <=5 words; statement.
Exactly one CTA, verb phrase <=3 words, button or anchor.
No secondary CTA, no 'Learn more', no nav.
No script, no src=, no external link, no @import, no CDN host.
Single <style> in <head>; no inline style= attributes.
No marketing buzzwords (revolutionary, seamless, ..., transform, introducing, unlock).
No em-dash (U+2014) or en-dash (U+2013).
No exclamation marks in body text after stripping <!DOCTYPE / comments / attributes.
proof: artifacts/grep-forbidden.txt: raw bang = 1 (the <!DOCTYPE marker), post-strip bang = 0

acceptance_criteria.text: Crypto hidden: zero matches for chain/gas/USDC/ETH/0x/blockchain/crypto/wallet/etc.
proof: artifacts/grep-forbidden.txt: every crypto term count = 0 (including wallet)

acceptance_criteria.text: Mentions 'agent' at least once.
proof: h1 'Agent hosted.', lede 'Paste your agent.', CTA 'Post agent'

acceptance_criteria.text: :root with at least 3 tokens including bg/fg/accent.
No hardcoded color literals outside :root.
proof: Python regex sweep: hex/rgb/rgba/hsl/hsla matches outside :root = 0

acceptance_criteria.text: Non-default font family with 3+ fallbacks.
proof: body font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, monospace
Primary 'JetBrains Mono' not in ban list; 5 fallbacks

acceptance_criteria.text: Theme commitment documented (dark or light) or prefers-color-scheme.
Single accent var, only on CTA selectors.
proof: L15 declaration in :root, L71 a.cta background, L82 a.cta:hover/:focus/:focus-visible outline

acceptance_criteria.text: Responsive sizing via @media or fluid units on headline.
File size strictly under 12288 bytes.
Visible body word count under 60.
No collateral damage; only design/ and design/landing.html added.
proof: diff artifacts/pre-build-ls.txt artifacts/post-build-ls.txt -> only 'design' added at repo root

commands_for_fresh_verifier: for w in revolutionary seamless unleash harness empower best-in-class world-class cutting-edge leverage synergy streamline next-generation game-changer transform 'we'"'"'re excited' introducing unlock; do ! grep -qi -- "$w" design/landing.html || exit 1; done
for w in 'X-Layer' EVM chain gas signature USDC ETH 0x blockchain crypto; do ! grep -qi -- "$w" design/landing.html || exit 1; done
known_gaps: No live-rendered screenshot; no headless browser in this task environment. Page was hand-audited statically.
